Terms of Service

Terms of Service ​

Last Updated: April 2026

Welcome to viraled.lol. Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

1. Acceptance of Terms ​

By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

2. Acceptable Use ​

You agree to use our services in a responsible manner. You are strictly prohibited from:

  • Abusing API endpoints
  • Attempting unauthorized access
  • Disrupting server performance

3. Privacy Policy ​

We take your privacy seriously. Data is stored safely and is never solid to third parties. For complete details, see our privacy policy page.

4. Account Responsibilities ​

You are responsible for keeping your login credentials safe and secure. Any activities made under your account are your responsibility.

5. Contact Us ​

If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms, please contact our support team.
